query:
START TRANSACTION;

-- 先删除user_role_cities关联数据
DELETE FROM user_role_cities
WHERE userId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users
  WHERE 
    (name LIKE '%test%' 
    OR phone LIKE '%test%'
    OR email LIKE '%test%'
    OR name LIKE '%测试%'
    OR phone LIKE '%000%')
    AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')
    AND (email IS NULL OR email != '526test@example.com')
);

-- 删除users表测试数据
DELETE FROM users
WHERE 
  (name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR phone LIKE '%test%'
  OR email LIKE '%test%'
  OR name LIKE '%测试%'
  OR phone LIKE '%000%')
  AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')
  AND (email IS NULL OR email != '526test@example.com');

-- 验证结果
SELECT COUNT(*) as deleted_count FROM users WHERE id = 0;

COMMIT;
